notes: First 455 KB of .aion1 present in .reloc section on disk. Contains VM bytecode data starting at VA 0x11472000. Shannon entropy 6.51 confirms structured bytecode not random data.
Handler code and handler table are in the upper .aion1 range (0x114E2000+) which is not present in the packed binary. Handler table verified via Ghidra CSV (256 entries all valid).
RSI (bytecode ptr) = RSI_base + LOAD[RBP]. RBP = RDX from caller. Cannot resolve without running or unpacking. The bytecode BASE (RSI_base) is likely 0x11472000 (.aion1 start).
